basic_details.job_title: NIT Raipur Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: National Institute of Technology Raipur (NIT Raipur)
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Raipur (NIT Raipur) Recruitment 2026: National Institute of Technology Raipur has released the official notification for 1 Junior Research Fellow (JRF) posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking research jobs.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: Maximum 35 years. However, candidates above 35 years are eligible to apply.
age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years. Candidates above 35 years are eligible to apply.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E./B.Tech. and M.E./M.Tech. in Biomedical/ Electronics/ Electrical/ Mechanical Engineering or equivalent branches with minimum 60% marks or 6.5 CGPA (out of 10) in B.E./B.Tech. and M.E./M.Tech. OR B.E./B.Tech. from any Institute of National Importance with minimum 75% marks or 8.0 CGPA (out of 10).
qualification.details: B.E./B.Tech. and M.E./M.Tech. in Biomedical/ Electronics/ Electrical/ Mechanical Engineering or equivalent branches with minimum 60% marks or 6.5 CGPA (out of 10) in B.E./B.Tech. and M.E./M.Tech. B.E./B.Tech. from any Institute of National Importance with minimum 75% marks or 8.0 CGPA (out of 10). Prior experience in handling clinical samples is preferable.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 37,000/- per month + HRA, for first two Years and Rs. 42,000/- per month + HRA, for third Year
salary_details.details: For the first two years: Rs. 37,000/- per month + HRA For the third year: Rs. 42,000/- per month + HRA

selection_process: GATE/NET including Lectureship (preferable). Selection processes through National Level Examinations conducted by the central Govt. Departments and their agencies and Institutions such as ICMR/IIT/IISc/DST
etc. Sound Knowledge in COMSOL Multiphysics
Origin data analysis software. Prior experience in handling clinical samples is preferable.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Raipur Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 17-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download NIT Raipur Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NIT Raipur JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application via email is 17-06-2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated email address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the JRF post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a B.E./B.Tech. and M.E./M.Tech. in specific engineering branches with a minimum of 60% marks or 6.5 CGPA. Alternatively, a B.E./B.Tech. from an Institute of National Importance with 75% marks or 8.0 CGPA is also accepted.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit is 35 years. However, the notification states that candidates above 35 years are also eligible to apply.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the JRF post?
faq.answer: The salary is Rs. 37,000/- per month + HRA for the first two years and Rs. 42,000/- per month + HRA for the third year.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the NIT Raipur JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications must be sent via email to Dr. Mainak Basu at [email protected], along with all required documents, as a single PDF file.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee has been mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the JRF position?
faq.answer: The selection process may involve GATE/NET scores, national-level examinations, and an assessment of knowledge in specific software and practical experience.

faq.question: Q8. What is the location of the NIT Raipur JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is for the National Institute of Technology Raipur, located in Raipur, Chhattisgarh, with the pincode 492010.

faq.question: Q9. Is prior experience required for the JRF role?
faq.answer: While not strictly mandatory, prior experience in handling clinical samples is considered preferable for the Junior Research Fellow position.

faq.question: Q10. What documents are needed for the application?
faq.answer: You need to submit your duly filled application form, relevant mark sheets, certificates, supportive documents, age proof, research experience certificate (if any), and CV as a single PDF file.
